overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a character in a long coat walking across a foggy gothic bridge at night toward an industrial city skyline. The scene features wet reflective pavement, towering bridge pillars, and atmospheric street lighting with a distinct horror-fantasy aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic bridge walkway approaching overhead gantry

agents.ego_description: character in a long dark coat walking steadily across the rain-slicked bridge deck toward the distant city

entered.detail: massive tapered concrete pillar with weathered gothic texture
matching concrete pillar forming the bridge gateway
metal truss structure spanning between pillars with blank rectangular sign faces
ornate black iron lamppost casting warm yellow light through the fog
distant industrial city spires with glowing windows barely visible through heavy mist
dark metal safety railing running along the bridge edge
rain-slicked concrete surface reflecting street lamps and sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night bridge scene with a lone character walking toward two massive gothic pillars. The wet pavement reflects the warm glow of ornate street lamps while a distant industrial city looms through the mist. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character approaches the overhead gantry structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open bridge deck beyond the gateway pillars

events.description: character passes under the overhead gantry between the two massive bridge pillars

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward past the bridge gateway toward the city, coat billowing slightly

segments.scene_description: The character passes between the towering bridge pillars and under the overhead gantry, transitioning to the open span beyond. The gateway structures fall behind as the city skyline becomes more centered in the view. The street lamp recedes to the left as the character continues the lonely walk across the fog-shrouded bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a foggy gothic bridge that transitions from a confined gateway into an open, desolate span toward a distant city. It begins behind a lone character walking toward two massive gothic pillars, where the wet pavement reflects the warm glow of ornate street lamps against a misty backdrop. As the character moves forward, the camera follows them beneath an overhead gantry, causing the towering pillars to recede and frame the path behind them. The scene then opens up as the character enters the open span of the bridge, with the street lamps falling away to the left. Finally, the view centers on the looming industrial skyline as the character continues their lonely journey through the shroud of fog.
